subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Jamal 2
subcodes.first_line: O Jalíl! Hearken unto the Call of thy Lord, the Self-Sufficing, the Most Exalted. Arise in the Cause and enjoin the people unto that which is good. Thus doth He command thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ج ل اسمع ندآء ربک الغنی المتعال قم علی الامر و امر الناس بالمعروف کذلک یامرک
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @love of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @chastisement and requital, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
